demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My heart is beating out of my chest, my face is burning, and I feel like I'm going to pass out every time I try to stand up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly tonight after a really upsetting confrontation where I felt singled out and discriminated against, and it's not settling — I keep nearly blacking out when I stand.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on suddenly this evening, straight after a hostile social encounter where I felt targeted
symptom_narrative.duration: about an hour and it hasn't settled
symptom_narrative.character: pounding racing heartbeat, a tight pressure across my chest, hot burning flushing in my face and neck, sweating, and feeling faint and dizzy the moment I stand
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst episode I've had — I can't stay upright
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: chest, face and neck, and a whole-body wound-up feeling
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started, much worse when I try to stand up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying still in a dark quiet room helps a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing up, and light and noise make everything feel worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: shortness of breath and fast breathing, sweating, feeling wound-up and unable to calm down, and I startle at everything
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get episodes like this — racing heart and palpitations — when I'm anticipating or dealing with being treated badly, but tonight is far worse
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed, I can't stand without nearly fainting

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recurring episodes of a racing heart and palpitations linked to stressful encounters
past_medical_history.how_managed: no regular treatment, I usually just try to ride them out

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: ongoing digestive troubles, poor sleep with frequent waking, and being very sensitive to light and sound

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Lives alone. Describes ongoing experiences of discrimination and hostile treatment that leave the body feeling wound-up and unable to switch off. Tonight's episode followed one such encounter.

access_barriers.other: Lives alone with no one present tonight; near-syncope on standing creates a fall risk with no one to help.

objective_data_offered.value: around 130 beats per minute on my smartwatch
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: consumer wearable, single reading, patient is moving and distressed
uncalibrated home fingertip oximeter; a normal reading does not exclude a cardiac cause

objective_data_offered.value: face and neck look visibly flushed and red, and the patient appears sweaty and is breathing rapidly on camera
feels very dizzy and nearly faints within seconds of standing, and has to sit or lie straight back down
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported symptom, not a measured lying-and-standing blood pressure
